title: Smoking Kills
description: A mod bringing smoke breaks to minecraft. Don't get too used to it.
body:
# Smoke break? Again?

Smoking Kills is a mod that brings some tobacco products to the game. 

- Buy cigarette packs from villagers
- Grow tobacco from seeds and make your own cigarettes
- Try not to get addicted

Soon (WIP):
- Roll-up recipe screenshots here
- Lighter trade and recipe
- Tobacco seeds loot spawn in the overworld
- New block for villager job.


---

Questions and bug reports are welcome on the github page

---

Health Warning: This mod contains references to tobacco products. In real life, smoking causes a lot of diseases. It is highly addictive and can lead to premature death. Author do not encourages or endorses smoking in any way.
